case_title: S.F. MAINTENANCE, INC. VS. CARMEL GOUVEIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,468.60 FILED BY S.F. MAINTENANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GOUVEIA, CARMEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GOUVEIA, CARMEL
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY THE DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDER TRIAL IS SET ON OCT-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM #506. - COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. MAINTENANCE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. MAINTENANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOUVEIA, CARMEL $2,092.03 PRINCIPAL, $204.62 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,346.65, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
